html: Just published a new paper entitled Indonesia's urban green spaces dilemma: Balancing law, ecology, and public space, highlighting Jakarta in Human Geography. [DOI]
Launched project pages for Prompting Sustainability and Cooling Cities. Go check them out!
Started as Project Researcher at the Department of Geography UI, leading a funded project on climate resilience in urban green spaces.
Paper published in Computational Urban Science: Harmonizing street-view semantics and spatial predictors for dominant urban visual composition modelling.
Joined the Strategic Environmental Assessment Team for West Bangka Regency as Cartographer.
Paper published in GeoScape: Unveiling greenery and visual comfort: Integrating Green View Index and image segmentation in panoramic rural landscapes.
